description_long: This is a life-sized stone sculpture of a standing male figure dressed in classical or Renaissance attire, including a tunic, cloak, and a plumed hat. The figure holds a large, curved object in his right hand, possibly a shield or a scroll, and his left hand rests on his hip. The sculpture is highly detailed, with visible folds in the clothing, defined facial features, and textured hair and beard. The back of the figure is covered by a long, flowing cloak that drapes to the base. The statue stands on a rectangular plinth, suggesting it is intended for outdoor or public display. The surface shows signs of weathering, indicating it may have been exposed to the elements.
description: A detailed stone sculpture of a standing male figure in classical attire, holding a curved object and draped in a cloak. The statue is life-sized and stands on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, detailed clothing, and the curved object held in the right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the figure, the depth of the cloak, and the protruding curved object.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the cloak and the back of the head, with minimal detail on the face or front.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's arm bent at the hip and the side of the curved object, as well as the layered clothing.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure in classical or Renaissance attire
attribute_location_context: No visible context; isolated on a plain background, typical of catalog or archival photography.
